papers.title: SONIC: Supersizing Motion Tracking for Natural Humanoid Whole-Body Control
used_for: 确认 motion tracking 是 SONIC 的核心训练任务
确认 Universal Token 多 encoder 输入输出语义不能因环境兼容修复而改变
确认训练 smoke 需要覆盖 G1/teleop/SMPL 基础闭环

project_links.paper_concept: motion tracking as scalable foundation task
project_links.server_verification: motion_lib load, reset/step, finite reward, PPO smoke on H20

project_links.paper_concept: universal token space with multiple control interfaces
project_links.server_verification: tokenizer obs keys/shapes match g1/teleop/smpl encoder inputs after dependency changes
action_dim=29 and order diagnostics pass on server

reference_implementations.name: gear_sonic original training stack
reference_implementations.role: source of SONIC training semantics and TRL integration

reference_implementations.name: mjlab
reference_implementations.role: target simulator framework reference; read-only unless user approves external modifications

target_code.responsibility: project-level uv dependency constraints for server-compatible training environment
resolved project dependency set; currently includes CUDA 13 wheels that must be validated or replaced for Driver 570/CUDA 12.8 server
SONIC G1 MuJoCo asset, canonical joint/body/action order and mapping constants
Hydra manager config to mjlab ManagerBasedRlEnvCfg mapping
motion_lib command, reset sampling, future refs, encoder sampling, order diagnostics
policy/critic/tokenizer observations for Universal Token training
TRL-compatible env wrapper, obs flattening, eval/training hooks and diagnostics
shared training entry with mjlab backend switch

current_lock_risk.risk: Driver 570 reports CUDA 12.8 and may not support CUDA 13 runtime wheels

notes: 本轮没有新增论文检索需求；论文仅用于保护 SONIC 训练语义，服务器兼容计划主要依据项目配置、锁文件和历史验证记录。
